channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's intelligence pick may threaten key U.S. spy tool. Who is Bill Pulte?
item.description: Pulte's nomination disrupts renewal talks for the FISA 702 spy tool, as lawmakers from both parties criticize his lack of national...

item.title: Queens' 7 train corridor embraces World Cup as 'beautiful game'
item.description: The 2026 World Cup is in New Jersey, but in Queens, home to global immigrants, soccer transcends sport. It...

item.title: Key World Cup statistics to help you sound knowledgeable
item.description: With 48 teams and 1,248 players, the 2026 FIFA World Cup offers countless stats. Here are some highlights.

item.title: SpaceX prepares for launch with potential record-breaking IPO
item.description: Elon Musk's rocket company, now merged with xAI, plans to raise $75 billion in its initial public offering, the first of three expected major IPOs.
